chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

parts.text: نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
آلِهِ : أَنْ يُتَخَطَّى اَلْقِطَارُ قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ

text: «لِأَنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنْ قِطَارٍ إِلاَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَ اَلْبَعِيرِ إِلَى اَلْبَعِيرِ شَيْطَانٌ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2487 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) forbade stepping over the camel line (caravan).
It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), why?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Because there is not a single camel line except that between one camel and the next there is a devil."
